name: Viatris Inc
summary: PARTI About Viatris Viatris is a global healthcare company whose breadth and scale we believe make it uniquely positioned to address healthcare needs globally. With a mission to empower people worldwide to live healthier at every stage of life, Viatris supplies high-quality medicines to approximately 1 billion patients around the world each year.
